## Summary

Please provide a concise description of the feature/fix in this PR.

## Testing Evidence

Attach test evidence (screenshots, logs, test command output, or video link).

- Test type: Unit / UI / Manual / Integration
- Result: Pass / Fail
- Evidence link(s):

## Reviewer

Tag at least one reviewer (not the PR author): @username

## Conflict Handling

Describe how merge conflicts (if any) were handled and discussed with the team.

## Required Checklist

- [ ] Function description is complete and clear.
- [ ] Testing evidence is attached.
- [ ] At least one reviewer (not the author) is assigned or requested.
- [ ] Conflict handling is documented (or explicitly marked as no conflict).
